model-drift-monitor.name: Model behavior drift monitor — fire alert

params.message: 🔥 model-drift-monitor fired — {{reason}} — entities: {{joined_entities}}. See drafted incident summary above for assembled evidence (Twitter complaints + GitHub issues + provider acknowledgment status).
✅ model-drift-monitor resolved — {{lost_entities}} no longer firing. Provider has likely shipped a fix and/or community discourse has subsided.
MCP creators webset is idle. Verification complete — review qualified candidates.
Lawn care webset finished populating. Review items and send quote emails.

lifecycle-harvest.description: Create webset → poll until idle → collect all items. The foundational webset lifecycle.

convergent-search.description: Run 2-5 search queries in parallel, identify entities appearing across multiple queries.

qd-winnow.description: Quality-diversity selection across criteria and enrichments.

verified-collection.description: Collect entities via search, then deep-research selected ones with template expansion.

adversarial-verify.description: Test a hypothesis by gathering evidence for and against in parallel (thesis vs antithesis).

deep-research.description: Open-ended research via Exa Research API. Provide a question, get synthesis across sources.

search-and-read.description: Search + fetch full page contents for the top results.

expand-and-collect.description: Search, then expand coverage via findSimilar on top results. Deduplicates by URL.

verified-answer.description: Answer a question with independent validation. Checks citation overlap with independent sources.

semantic-cron.description: Semantic monitoring over time with lens/shape/join/signal logic and snapshot persistence.

verify-enrichments.description: Verify enrichments against public data. Parallel verification with re-submission on failure.

annotate-item.description: Annotate a webset item in the local store with judgment, tag, note, or research finding.

airtable-upsert.description: Write or update records in an Airtable table.

notify-user.description: Report a message to the user.

send-email.description: Draft an email for human review via Gmail channel.

reply-email.description: Reply to an inbound email via Gmail channel.

linear-comment.description: Add a comment to a Linear issue.

linear-transition.description: Move a Linear issue to a different state.

linear-assign.description: Assign a Linear issue to a team member.

linear-list-issues.description: List Linear issues with optional filters.

draft-incident-summary.description: Compose a model-drift incident summary in markdown for human review. Pulls the latest snapshot for the named config, lists joined entities with cross-lens evidence (Twitter handles, GitHub issue URLs, regression direction, repo, issue state), and tags the summary with rumor_window vs confirmed based on whether provider acknowledgment has been observed. Output goes to a notify step or, when wired up, can be drafted as a Linear ticket / Slack post / Gmail draft.

params_template.message:
## Model-drift incident

Config: `{{config_name}}` — fired with reason `{{reason}}`

**Joined entities ({{entity_count}}):** {{joined_entities}}

**New since last snapshot:** {{new_entities}}

**Lens evidence:** Twitter (`twitter_complaints`) + GitHub (`github_issues`) — see channel notification body for per-entity Model name + Regression direction + Repo + Issue state matrix.

**Suggested action:** review the entity list. For each entity firing with `worse-quality`, consider pinning downstream agents to a previous model version while community/provider acknowledgment status is verified.

_Tag (rumor_window vs confirmed) requires fire-time predicate cell — not yet implemented._
